Name: Murda Murda
Notes: Sounds like somebody imitate Jay-Z voice & flow, this might be a NY rapper called Bathgate who was accused of sounding like Jay-Z and ironically later got signed to Roc-A-Fella.

Name:
Dr. Dre - Nigga Like Me
(feat. Jay-Z & JB) (prod. Dr. Dre & Scott Scortch)
(Get Your Money Right)
Notes: Jay-Z Verse is edited and comes from an unreleased version of "So Right" by The Lox. Originally, Jay wanted to be on "Money, Power & Respect," but The LOX had already chosen DMX for that track and only wanted Jay on "So Right." Since they wouldn't let him be on both songs, Jay decided not to clear his verse for "So Right" Still, his vocals somehow ended up on the acapella version included with some single releases. DJ Vlad later took those vocals and blended them into this track. Dre and JB's parts are real.

Name:
The Game - Get Your Money Right
(feat. Dr. Dre, Jay-Z & JB) (prod. Dr. Dre & Scott Scortch)
(Nigga Like Me)
Notes: DJ Vlad eventually passes this song onto "The Game" and he releases it on the G-Unit Mixtape

Name:
Lupe Fiasco - Sittin Sideways (Remix)
(feat. JAY-Z)
Notes: Jay-Z Verse is taken from "Back Then (Freestyle)"

Name:
Kanye West - We Major
(feat. Nas & JAY-Z)
Notes: The Prelude to the Throne was a mixtape planning to be made to gain hype for Watch The Throne, yet was never released. JAY-Z was supposed to be on the original "We Major", but after a feud with Nas he never recorded for it. The mixtape was supposed to have all songs Jay and Ye were on together, along with this exclusive remix with JAY-Z on the track. A video surfaced on Youtube and fooled many, but it was ultimately discovered to be fake.

Name:
Dr. Dre - Under Pressure
(feat. Jay-Z & Diablo Vazquez) (prod. Dr. Dre)
Notes: Later version of "Under Pressure" featuring little-known artist Diablo Vazquez filling in the previously open sections of the song with a hook, often mistaken for Sly Pyper. The legitimacy and origin of this version is a bit unclear, it surfaced sometime around September 2010, but given the artists' obscurity and the song having leaked already it's possible it's a remix of sorts being passed off as official. Only a very low-quality version has surfaced.
